name: The Union
street_level_visibility: Humans and Gnomes remain primary; Half-Elves, Elves, and Yuan-Ti are formalized as durable resident blocs in the exchange and mediation core.
visitor_signal: Visitors to The Union should perceive the dominant populations first and the secondary populations as stable but not polity-defining unless narrower locality canon states otherwise.
runtime_rule: Runtime narration may elaborate visible population mix but may not contradict canonical roster or exclusions.
